## what & why

<!-- what does this change, and why? link any issue: closes #123 -->

## type

- [ ] bug fix
- [ ] new feature
- [ ] refactor / cleanup
- [ ] docs
- [ ] **calls** (the big one — bless you)

## checklist

- [ ] it builds — backend: `npx tsc --noEmit` is green / android: `./gradlew :app:assembleRelease` passes
- [ ] i matched the surrounding style (casual, comment-light)
- [ ] if i touched a screen, all three skins (classic / nova / galaxy) still work and the classic path is untouched
- [ ] new db tables = a new numbered migration in `backend/migrations/`
- [ ] no secrets committed (keystore, google-services.json, tokens)
